rate_limits.notes: Webex documents most REST APIs as roughly 300 requests per minute, with /people and /messages dynamically adjusted. Use a conservative rolling limiter and respect Retry-After for 429 and 423 responses.

endpoints.name: people
endpoints.purpose: List Webex users for datasource identity indexing.

endpoints.name: teams
endpoints.purpose: List teams to index as datasource groups.

endpoints.name: team_memberships
endpoints.purpose: List team members to index team group memberships.

endpoints.name: rooms
endpoints.purpose: List rooms to index room documents and discover room-scoped messages and memberships.

endpoints.name: memberships
endpoints.purpose: List room members for room/message document ACLs.

endpoints.name: messages
endpoints.purpose: List room messages to build searchable thread documents.
